source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a WorthScan post for used premium headphones with condition and authenticity risk.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Check exact model, case and accessories, battery age if wireless, pad wear, authenticity clues, warranty status if visible, and three local electronics comps.

source_inputs.label: Research boundary
source_inputs.value: Manual reviewed examples only. No hidden endpoints, no scraping, and no account automation.

trend_examples.hook: These headphones look cheap until you check the pads
trend_examples.notes: Condition detail makes the valuation feel specific.

trend_examples.hook: Ask for these photos before buying used audio

trend_examples.notes: Accessory reveal gives a clear reason for the range.

notes: No paid calls, scraping, browser UI, or posting automation.
Metrics are entered manually after posts.

slides.on_screen_text: Scan these headphones before you pay
slides.visual_direction: Show approved listing image, asking price, and model name.

slides.on_screen_text: Check model, pads, case, cable, and battery
slides.visual_direction: Detail crop the pads, hinges, charging case, and accessories.
Show comp cards with model, included accessories, and condition.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract pad wear, missing case, and authenticity risk
slides.visual_direction: Use warning chips for the top risks.

slides.on_screen_text: Worth range: good buy or keep scrolling
slides.visual_direction: Show final range, confidence, and CTA.

output_requirements.caption: Would you buy these used headphones? Comment "scan" with the next listing. WorthScan is an estimate, not a guarantee.
output_requirements.spoken_script: Used headphones need more than a brand name. Check exact model, pad wear, case, cable, battery clues, and authenticity risk, then compare three similar used listings before giving a range.
posting_notes: Do not state authenticity unless verified by the human reviewer.
Blur seller names and private contact info.
